species-streams

(/moleculizer-input/streams/species-streams)

A species stream is a collection of species whose populations are summed for dumping to output. This is a surprisingly common need; for example, to get the total amount of Ste4 that is bound to Ste5, one has to specify all the species that contain the Ste4-Ste5 subcomplex. This can be done with an omni-species-stream.

AttributesChildren
    • plex-species-stream
    • omni-species-stream
